title: Cryo-EM structural determination of VPS13C
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9ggik","text":"VPS13C is a ER-lysosome contact site protein that is thought to transport lipids between the two organellar membranes and important for lysosomal membrane damage repair. We employed structure-function analysis of purified VPS13C and uncovered novel regulatory mechanisms. This protocol describes how we obtained the Cryo-EM map for full-length VPS13C and how we build the structural models for VPS13C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"fi606","text":"The EM reconstructions for the N-terminal part of VPS13C requires tailored mask creation and local refinement.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"7fhmm","text":"VPS13C demonstrates preferred orientation on carbon-coated Cryo-EM grids. But the protein yield could not support freezing on standard gold grids.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"13i7e","text":"Quantifoil R1.2/1.3 300 mesh gold grids coated with a 2nm continuous carbon film (Cat. # 668-300-AU, Ted Pella).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"asqo8","text":"CryoSPARC v4 or above on HPC or workstation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Clean the EM grid using an oxygen/argon plasma in a Gatan Solarus Advanced Plasma System. Quantifoil R1.2/1.3 300 mesh gold grids coated with a 2nm continuous carbon film Ted Pella, Inc. Catalog ## 668-300-AU
Apply 3.5 μL concentrated VPS13C sample (~0.04 mg/mL) to the grid and incubate for 30 s.
Blot the grid for 1.5 s at blot force −12 in a Vitrobot Mark IV at 8 °C and 100% humidity, then plunge-freeze in liquid ethane cooled by liquid nitrogen.
Clip and screen the grids, store selected grids in liquid nitrogen.
Load pre-screened grids into a Titan Krios transmission electron microscope operated at 300 kV and equipped with a BioQuantum energy filter and K3 direct electron detector.

Acquire data in SerialEM using super-resolution mode at 0.534 Å/pixel with a defocus range of −2.0 to −2.5 μm. Note that the defocus was selected for better particle picking. A lower defocus range might be used.
Record each movie for 2.896 s as 50 dose-fractionated frames, corresponding to a total dose of 42.7 e−/Å².
Perform motion correction and CTF estimation in CryoSPARC. CryoSPARC v4.6.2 Structura Biotechnology Inc. The whole data processing workflow (Strep 9- Strep 18) and the statistics of refined maps.
Manually curate micrographs and discard poor-quality images.
Pick particles and extract them for downstream analysis.
Perform iterative 2D classification to remove junk particles and select good classes.
Collect 4,140 movies at 0° tilt and 4,914 movies at 25° tilt. This attenuates the preferred orientation problem of the VPS13C sample.
Generate initial 3D models by ab initio reconstruction.
Estimate final resolutions using gold-standard FSC at the 0.143 criterion.
Apply local or focused refinement with masks to improve flexible regions.
Refine the selected particles by non-uniform refinement.
Perform heterogeneous refinement to separate particle populations and select the best class.
creator: Dazhi Li
